#Draw !Magic! cards
Gain 8 Attack Overwrite and 6 Defense Overwrite.

Gain !B! Block for each card Exhausted.

ASTROLUPINE-LOGIC_BACKDOOR.title: Logic Backdoor
ASTROLUPINE-LOGIC_BACKDOOR.description:

Draw !Magic! cards.

ASTROLUPINE-PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION.descrip: #The next Attack card you play will Write its damage to the Attack Register.

ASTROLUPINE-MIMIC_AFTERIMAGE.description:
#Gain !B! Block.
At the start of your next turn, gain Block equal to your current Defense Register value.

#Draw !Magic! cards.
Each time this card is played this combat, its cost is reduced by 1.
ASTROLUPINE-MOUNT_HARD_DRIVE.title: Mount Hard Drive
ASTROLUPINE-MOUNT_HARD_DRIVE.description: #-To a random card in your hand-+Choose a card in your hand and+ add [Write] to it.
ASTROLUPINE-OVERWRITE.title: Overwrite
ASTROLUPINE-OVERWRITE.description: #Choose a card in your hand and add [Write] to it.
ASTROLUPINE-INTERFACE_EXTENSION.title: Interface Extension
ASTROLUPINE-INTERFACE_EXTENSION.descript: #Choose a card in your hand to gain both [Write] and [Exhaust].

ASTROLUPINE-KINETIC_CONVERSION.title: Kinetic Conversion

ASTROLUPINE-SYSTEM_UPGRADE.title: System Upgrade
ASTROLUPINE-DULL_CRYSTAL_SMASH.title: Dull Crystal Smash
ASTROLUPINE-DULL_CRYSTAL_SMASH.descripti:
#Deal !D! damage.
Deal damage 1 additional time for every 8 points in your Attack Register.
ASTROLUPINE-MEMORY_LEAK.title: Memory Leak
ASTROLUPINE-MEMORY_LEAK.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
If Fatal, permanently increase this card's base damage by !Magic!.
ASTROLUPINE-ALL_OUT.title: All Out
ASTROLUPINE-VEST_ASSAULT.title: Vest Assault
ASTROLUPINE-VEST_ASSAULT.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
If this is the first card you play this turn, double its damage.
ASTROLUPINE-DULL_CRYSTAL.title: Dull Crystal
ASTROLUPINE-DATA_CLEANSE.title: Data Cleanse
ASTROLUPINE-COMPUTE_OVERDRAFT.title: Compute Overdraft
ASTROLUPINE-MIMIC_RECKLESS_IMPACT.title: Mimic: Reckless Impact
ASTROLUPINE-MIMIC_RECKLESS_IMPACT.descri:
#Deal damage equal to Defense Register
(Deal !D! damage)
Gain !Magic! Defense Overwrite.
ASTROLUPINE-OPERATOR_IMPACT.title: Operator Impact
ASTROLUPINE-OPERATOR_IMPACT.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
If you have played a Skill this turn, gain !B! Block.
ASTROLUPINE-GET_TOKEN.title: Steal Token
ASTROLUPINE-GET_TOKEN.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
If the target has Trojan Horse Virus, gain 1 [E].
ASTROLUPINE-BUFFER_OVERFLOW.title: Buffer Overflow
ASTROLUPINE-RHOMBUS_SLICER.title: Rhombus Slicer
ASTROLUPINE-PARALLEL_PROCESSING.title: Parallel Processing
ASTROLUPINE-PARALLEL_PROCESSING.descript: #For this turn, all registers' values are doubled when Read.
ASTROLUPINE-READ_ONLY_LOCK.title: Read-Only Lock
ASTROLUPINE-READ_ONLY_LOCK.description: #Attack and Defense Register values will not drop below !Magic!.
ASTROLUPINE-EXCEPTION_HANDLING.title: Exception Handling
ASTROLUPINE-EXCEPTION_HANDLING.descripti: #Whenever a register value changes, deal !Magic! damage to ALL enemies.
ASTROLUPINE-LONE_WOLF.title: Lone Wolf
ASTROLUPINE-BOTNET.title: Botnet
ASTROLUPINE-BOTNET.description: #At the start of your turn, gain !Magic! Block for each layer of Trojan Horse Virus on all enemies.
ASTROLUPINE-LUPINE_INTUITION.title: Lupine Intuition
ASTROLUPINE-LUPINE_INTUITION.description: #Whenever an enemy is inflicted with Trojan Horse Virus or Zero-Day Exploit, gain !Magic! Block.
ASTROLUPINE-EXPLOIT_ANOMALY.title: Exploit Anomaly
ASTROLUPINE-EXPLOIT_ANOMALY.description: #At the start of your turn, if you have any Overwrite effect, gain !Magic! [E] and draw !Magic! cards.
ASTROLUPINE-COOLING_ARCHITECTURE.title: Cooling Architecture
ASTROLUPINE-COOLING_ARCHITECTURE.descrip: #At the start of your turn, if the Attack Register is at least !Magic!, draw 2 cards.
ASTROLUPINE-OPERATOR_OVERLOADING.title: Operator Overloading
ASTROLUPINE-OPERATOR_OVERLOADING.descrip: #Whenever you play a card with [Write], deal !Magic! damage to ALL enemies.
ASTROLUPINE-DAEMON.title: Daemon
ASTROLUPINE-FORMAT_STRIKE.title: Format Strike
ASTROLUPINE-FORMAT_STRIKE.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
Remove all Trojan Horse Virus from the target. For each stack removed, increase the base damage of all Format Strikes by !Magic!.
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT_ACCESS_ASSAULT.title: Root Access Assault
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT_ACCESS_ASSAULT.descript:
#Deal !D! damage.
If the target intends to Attack, Write a value equal to the damage dealt to the Defense Register.
ASTROLUPINE-GARBAGE_COLLECTION.title: Garbage Collection
ASTROLUPINE-GARBAGE_COLLECTION.descripti: #Exhaust all cards in your discard pile. Deal !D! damage for each card Exhausted.
ASTROLUPINE-ZERO_DAY_BLAST.title: Zero-Day Blast
ASTROLUPINE-ZERO_DAY_BLAST.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
Remove the target's Block and apply !Magic! Zero-Day Exploit.
ASTROLUPINE-DEADLOCK.title: Deadlock
ASTROLUPINE-DEADLOCK.description:
#Deal !D! damage !Magic! times.
Each hit deals additional damage equal to 2 times the target's Zero-Day Exploit stacks.
ASTROLUPINE-SUDO_STRIKE.title: Sudo Strike
ASTROLUPINE-SUDO_STRIKE.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
Costs !Magic! less for each stack of Attack Overwrite you have.
ASTROLUPINE-REDIRECT.title: Redirect
ASTROLUPINE-REDIRECT.description:
#Gain !B! Block.
Gain Kernel Hardening for the next 2 turns.
ASTROLUPINE-CRON_JOB.title: Cron Job
ASTROLUPINE-CRON_JOB.description:
#Gain !Magic! Attack Overwrite, !Magic2! Defense Overwrite, and !Magic3! Draw Overwrite.
Take an extra turn.
ASTROLUPINE-LOW_LEVEL_REFACTORING.title: Low Level Refactoring
ASTROLUPINE-LOW_LEVEL_REFACTORING.descri: #Add [Write] to all Attack cards in your hand.
ASTROLUPINE-SYSTEM_SNAPSHOT.title: System Snapshot
ASTROLUPINE-SYSTEM_SNAPSHOT.description:
#Record the values of all registers.
At the start of your next turn, revert all registers to these recorded values.
ASTROLUPINE-CONSOLE_AGENT.title: Console Agent
ASTROLUPINE-CONSOLE_AGENT.description: #-Draw X cards.-+Draw X+1 cards.+ For each card drawn, gain 1 [E].
ASTROLUPINE-SANDBOX_MODE.title: Sandbox Mode
ASTROLUPINE-SANDBOX_MODE.description: #For this turn, your [Write] effects no longer change register values, but instead grant Block equal to twice the card's value.
ASTROLUPINE-DYNAMIC_LINKING.title: Dynamic Linking
ASTROLUPINE-DYNAMIC_LINKING.description:
#Draw !Magic! cards.
For this turn, each time you play a card with [Read], gain 1 [E].
(Current gain: !EnergyGain! [E])
ASTROLUPINE-KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH.title: Knowledge Graph
ASTROLUPINE-KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH.description:
#At the start of your turn, put !Magic! cards from your draw pile into your hand.
They gain [Write] this turn.
ASTROLUPINE-DA_CONVERSION.title: D/A Conversion
ASTROLUPINE-DA_CONVERSION.description:
#Gain 1 Strength for every !Magic! points in Attack Register.
Gain 1 Block for every !Magic2! points in Defense Register.
ASTROLUPINE-DEEP_LEARNING.title: Deep Learning
ASTROLUPINE-DEEP_LEARNING.description: #Whenever you play a card with [Read] or [Write], deal !Magic! damage to a random enemy.
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT.title: Root Access
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT.description: #All your [Read] effects will read the highest value among all three registers.
ASTROLUPINE-HYPER_THREADING_FORM.title: Hyper-Threading Form
ASTROLUPINE-HYPER_THREADING_FORM.descrip: #The first [Write] card you play each turn writes double its value.
ASTROLUPINE-OPEN_SOURCE_PROTOCOL.title: Open Source Protocol
ASTROLUPINE-OPEN_SOURCE_PROTOCOL.descrip: #Whenever you gain any Overwrite effect, Attack and Defense registers increase by !Magic!.
ASTROLUPINE-TURING_COMPLETE.title: Turing Complete
ASTROLUPINE-TURING_COMPLETE.description: #Whenever you play a card with both [Read] and [Write], draw !Magic! cards.
